instructions.instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY security-sensitive code.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill before writing ANY security-sensitive code.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never use `String.to_atom/1` on user input** — exhausts the atom table and crashes the BEAM VM
instructions.original_snippets: **Never use `String.to_atom/1` on user input** — exhausts the atom table and crashes the BEAM VM
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never interpolate strings into `fragment()` or `SQL.query()`** — always use `?` parameters for fragments and `$1` for raw SQL
instructions.original_snippets: **Never interpolate strings into `fragment()` or `SQL.query()`** — always use `?` parameters for fragments and `$1` for raw SQL
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never redirect to user-controlled URLs** — validate against a whitelist or use verified routes (`~p"..."`)
instructions.original_snippets: **Never redirect to user-controlled URLs** — validate against a whitelist or use verified routes (`~p"..."`)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Avoid `raw/1` in templates** — if HTML is required, sanitize first with HtmlSanitizeEx
instructions.original_snippets: **Avoid `raw/1` in templates** — if HTML is required, sanitize first with HtmlSanitizeEx
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never log sensitive data** — passwords, tokens, secrets, API keys must never appear in Logger calls
instructions.original_snippets: **Never log sensitive data** — passwords, tokens, secrets, API keys must never appear in Logger calls
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2` for token comparison** — never `==`, which enables timing attacks
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2` for token comparison** — never `==`, which enables timing attacks
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run dependency audits after changes** — `mix deps.audit`, `mix hex.audit`, and `mix sobelow` catch known vulnerabilities
instructions.original_snippets: **Run dependency audits after changes** — `mix deps.audit`, `mix hex.audit`, and `mix sobelow` catch known vulnerabilities
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Write code** — implement the feature following the rules above
instructions.original_snippets: **Write code** — implement the feature following the rules above
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run `mix sobelow`** — static analysis catches common security issues
instructions.original_snippets: **Run `mix sobelow`** — static analysis catches common security issues
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run full audit** — `mix deps.audit && mix hex.audit && mix sobelow` before merging
